bts.name: Riemann Hypothesis
bts.notes: R2 numerical 4-probe scan on 50 Odlyzko zeros: (A) RvM zero-density max|diff|=0.886 bounded; (B) explicit formula sum_k 2Re(6^rho/rho) partials stable; (C) chi^2_GUE=8.14 vs chi^2_Poisson=56.42, GUE 6.9x better fit; (D) Li lambda_1..10 all positive. No RH violation. MISS expected — RH unresolved by any finite-K probe.

bts.name: Yang-Mills Mass Gap
bts.notes: R2 lattice angle (orthogonal to R1 numerology refinement + sibling bt543_yang_mills.hexa scan): 2D Z_2 Wilson area-law 7/7 PASS (sigma=-log(tanh(beta))), confining V(r)=sigma*r linear r=1..5 max_dev=0, Ising-dual m_gap>0 4/4 in disordered phase, Wegner self-duality sinh(2*beta_c)=1 at machine precision (dev=2.2e-16). Hexa math primitives (sqrt_/exp_/ln_/tanh_/sinh_) validated to ~1e-10. HONEST_MISS: 2D exactly solvable (Wilson 1974, Kramers-Wannier 1941, Wegner 1971); 4D Clay UNRESOLVED. Stdlib gaps: no RNG, no Haar sampling — needed for 4D MC.

bts.name: Hodge Conjecture
bts.notes: R1 Lefschetz+symmetry+Kahler angle (orthogonal to R0's n=6 coincidence): (A) Hodge diamond (p,q)<->(q,p) + Serre duality clean on P2/P1xP1/Q5/Enr 4/4; (B) chi from alternating Hodge sum matches topology 4/4 (3, 4, -200, 12); (C) Lefschetz (1,1) theorem rho=h^{1,1} verified on P2(1), P1xP1(2), Enriques(10) 3/3 -- this IS the K=1 case of Hodge conj, known unconditionally; (D) Kahler identity Delta_d=2 Delta_dbar verified on T^2 scalar spectrum across 48 modes; (E) h^{1,1}(P^n)=1 consistent for n=1..10. HONEST MISS: K>=2 generic projective varieties dim>=4 remain open. Round 1 confirms K=1 numerically; no new law claimed.

bts.name: Poincare Conjecture
bts.notes: R2 Chow-Luo discrete Ricci flow on octahedron S^2 (n=6 vertices) — Hamilton 2D uniformization numerically verified: P1 topo invariant sumK=6pi preserved, P2 varK 0.5546 -> 1.68e-30 (machine precision), P3 monotone decrease across 200 dt=0.05 steps, P4 u-spread -> 1.01e-15, P5 round octahedron is fixed point. ALL 5 predictions PASS. Law 2509 (Ricci peak at transitions) cross-ref: max|K-K*| 1.24 -> 2.2e-15. No new Poincare proof — Perelman 2003 stands. 3D Ricci-flow-with-surgery blocked on hexa stage1: no PDE solver, no tensor primitives, no arbitrary precision for Perelman W-entropy.
